# Sprint 1 — Student Dashboard: initial implementation

## Summary
- Describe what this PR changes.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Home dashboard lists enrolled classes with class name, course code, instructor, day/time, location, credits, and waitlist status.
- [ ] List view and calendar view toggle both work.
- [ ] Class card click opens detailed class view with professor, capacity, location, times, and enrollment/waitlist info.
- [ ] Data comes from REST API endpoints, not hardcoded data.
- [ ] Frontend is responsive and accessible (keyboard + ARIA labels).
- [ ] Backend unit/integration tests pass.
- [ ] Frontend tests pass.
- [ ] CI workflow passes on PR.

## Test Evidence
- [ ] `dotnet test backend/Tests/Backend.Tests.csproj`
- [ ] `npm test` (frontend)
- [ ] `npm run build` (frontend)
- [ ] `dotnet build backend/backend.csproj`

- Assumptions / known limitations:
